title: Replace the stable-call runtime bridge with direct native calls
target_architecture: Published stable callsites invoke trusted native entries with a prepared binder plan and never enter the retired generic runtime bridge.

allowed_php_semantic_slow_paths.name: runtime-created callable resolution
allowed_php_semantic_slow_paths.reason: PHP permits a callable target to be created after publication, so this target cannot use a prepared stable-call entry.

diff_allowlist.reason: This typed resolver is entered only for a callable target created at runtime and does not re-enter the retired engine route.

expected_metric_movement.reason: Stable calls stop crossing the generic runtime bridge.
Published stable callsites invoke their native target directly.
The replacement must not introduce another production fallback classification.
